summary: Iteration 24: Frontend-only testing of two new UI enhancements - Show Hardware SKU toggle and Model tooltip with sizing details. All 7 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Show Hardware SKU toggle exists with data-testid='show-hardware-toggle'
Toggle is unchecked by default (data-state: unchecked, aria-checked: false)
Hardware SKU column is hidden when toggle is unchecked (verified in Site Sizing table headers)
Hardware SKU column appears when toggle is checked (shows values like TE-1606-HW-AC)
Model badge has tooltip on hover (appears within 1 second)
Model tooltip shows QPS, LPS, Objects values (e.g., QPS: 20.8K, LPS: 56, Objects: 275K)
Model tooltip shows star (★) next to the driver metric (e.g., Objects: 275K★)
Model tooltip shows penalties if applicable - verified Multi-protocol: 130% capacity for DNS/DHCP site
critical_code_review_comments: calculations.js getSiteWorkloadDetails function (lines 270-369) correctly calculates QPS, LPS, Objects and determines driver metric
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx showHardware state (line 181) correctly defaults to false
Toggle UI (lines 826-834) uses Checkbox component with proper data-testid
Conditional Hardware SKU column rendering (lines 895, 1135-1148) correctly responds to showHardware state
Model tooltip (lines 1086-1133) correctly displays sizing details with driver metric star and penalties
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test' customer with 7 sites (3 Data Centers with GM/GMC roles, 4 Locations with DNS/DHCP roles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two UI enhancements verified: 1) Show Hardware SKU toggle - checkbox above Site Sizing table that shows/hides Hardware SKU column (hidden by default). 2) Model tooltip - hover on model badge (e.g., TE-1526) to see sizing details including QPS, LPS, Objects with star (★) indicating driver metric, and penalties if applicable (Hub, Spoke, Multi-protocol).

show_hardware_sku_toggle.column_hidden_by_default: Yes - Hardware SKU not in Site Sizing table headers
show_hardware_sku_toggle.column_visible_when_checked: Yes - Hardware SKU column appears with values like TE-1606-HW-AC
show_hardware_sku_toggle.code_location: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx: state line 181, toggle UI lines 826-834, conditional column lines 895, 1135-1148

model_tooltip.shows_driver_star: Yes - ★ next to driver metric (e.g., Objects: 275K★)
model_tooltip.shows_penalties: Yes - 'Penalties Applied: • Multi-protocol: 130% capacity' for DNS/DHCP sites

penalty_types_tested.multi_protocol: Verified - shown for DNS/DHCP role sites (130% capacity)
penalty_types_tested.hub_penalty: Not tested - no Hub sites in test data
penalty_types_tested.spoke_penalty: Not tested - no Spoke sites in test data
